title: Newmont to Acquire Properties to Support Land Use Planning in Tahltan Territory
text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM, TSX:NGT) announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement with Skeena Resources Limited to acquire certain properties located in Tahltan Territory in northwestern British Columbia conditional upon the successful completion of Skeena's proposed acquisition of QuestEx Gold & Copper Ltd.
